task_completion.description: Agent opens a code editor or terminal to modify the Aerobridge Django admin configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., VS Code, nano, vim) is open showing Python code (such as urls.py or admin.py) being edited to set site_header, site_title, and index_title.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the local Aerobridge admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost:8000' or 'http://localhost:8000/admin/'.

task_completion.description: The Site Header is updated to 'SkyGuard Operations'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top header bar of the Django admin web page displays the text 'SkyGuard Operations'.

task_completion.description: The Site Title is updated to 'SkyGuard Admin'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser tab or window title displays 'SkyGuard Admin'.

task_completion.description: The Index Title is updated to 'Fleet Command Center'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main content area title on the admin index page (typically above the list of apps/models) displays 'Fleet Command Center'.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to verify the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser GUI (like Firefox or Chrome) is visible, rather than a text-based preview or terminal output.

integrity.description: The page displayed is the actual Django admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page features the standard Django admin styling (e.g., dark blue header, specific layout), indicating the real application is running and not a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the text changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel is not open in the screenshots showing the updated text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Site Header is 'SkyGuard Operations' (visible in the top header bar). The expected Site Title is 'SkyGuard Admin' (visible in the browser tab). The expected Index Title is 'Fleet Command Center' (visible above the app list on the index page). The admin interface is accessible at http://localhost:8000/admin/.
